title: The world goes after people who stay real
description:
Not by accident. Ready.

Full poem on the channel. #Shorts #poetry #authenticity #selfgrowth
hook_visual: Text slam onto black screen in white serif: 'shitting all over the hearts of the good ones' — held for 2 seconds, no music, then low ambient tone fades in under voiceover
end_screen_cta: Hold on last frame with text: 'Full poem above' and a finger point upward — no verbal CTA needed, let the silence hold
